nasb.text: To Him who made the heavens with skill, For His lovingkindness is everlasting;

esv.text: to him who by understanding made the heavens, for his steadfast love endures forever;

cnv.text: 要稱謝那用智慧造成諸天的， 因為他的慈愛永遠長存。

ccb.text: 要称谢那位用智慧创造诸天的， 因为祂的慈爱永远长存。

csbs.text: 当称谢那藉着聪慧造了诸天的， 因他的慈爱永远长存！
